name: Pointer Highlight
summary: A wrapper component that draws an animated border rectangle and cursor pointer around children on scroll into view.
detailedDescription: Pointer Highlight wraps content with an animated highlight effect using Framer Motion. On scroll into view (whileInView), the component draws a border rectangle that expands from 0x0 to full container dimensions over 1s easeInOut. Simultaneously, a cursor pointer icon (h-5 w-5, default blue-500) animates from opacity 0 to 1, positioning at bottom-right corner (width + 4px, height + 4px) with -90deg rotation. The container uses ResizeObserver for responsive dimension tracking, updating on resize. Initial animation scales from 0.95 to 1 over 0.5s easeOut. The pointer uses custom SVG component with configurable className. Border defaults to neutral-800 (light) or neutral-200 (dark). This creates a 'click here' or 'focus area' visual cue ideal for feature highlights, callout sections, tutorial steps, or any context where drawing attention to specific content area enhances user guidance and interaction discovery.
purpose: Draw animated border around content on scroll
Add cursor pointer indicator to highlight areas
Guide user attention to specific content regions
behavior: Animates border from 0 to full size on view
Fades in cursor pointer at corner position
recommendations: Best for premium landing page sections and hero compositions.
